---
name: Friction Report
about: Something felt wrong, confusing, or harder than it should be
title: "[friction] "
labels: friction
---

## What were you doing?

What command or workflow were you using?

## What felt wrong?

Describe the friction — confusion, unexpected behavior, unclear guidance, too many steps, etc.

## What would have felt right?

What did you expect or want to happen?

## Impact

How much did this slow you down? (minor annoyance / blocked my work / gave up)
